scripts.start:public: npm run pre-build && PUBLIC_ONLY=true docusaurus start
scripts.build: npm run pre-build && docusaurus build && npm run post-build
scripts.build:public: npm run pre-build && PUBLIC_ONLY=true docusaurus build --config docusaurus.config.js && npm run post-build
scripts.debug: npm run build && npm run test-routes
scripts.debug:public: PUBLIC_ONLY=true npm run build && npm run test-routes:public
scripts.test-routes: echo 'Testing routes...' && curl -s -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code} %{url_effective}\n' http://localhost:3000/ http://localhost:3000/internal http://localhost:3000/finance http://localhost:3000/operation || echo 'Start server first with npm start'
scripts.test-routes:public: echo 'Testing public routes...' && curl -s -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code} %{url_effective}\n' http://localhost:3000/ || echo 'Start server first with npm run start:public'
scripts.check-access: node -e "const {isEncrypted} = require('./src/utils/encryption-utils'); console.log('🔍 Access Check:'); console.log('Internal:', !isEncrypted('./docs-internal/_category_.json') ? '✅ UNLOCKED' : '🔒 ENCRYPTED'); console.log('Finance:', !isEncrypted('./docs-finance/_category_.json') ? '✅ UNLOCKED' : '🔒 ENCRYPTED'); console.log('Operation:', !isEncrypted('./docs-operation/_category_.json') ? '✅ UNLOCKED' : '🔒 ENCRYPTED');"}
